pi_items.source: O*NET Online confirms 11-2031.00 as 'Public Relations and Fundraising Managers' (https://www.onetonline.org/link/summary/11-2031.00). This is a valid SOC code for the VP of Digital Communications role described in the task.

Task description explicitly states 'You are Rachel Torres' and 'Update the admin profile with your name (Rachel Torres)'. Setup script injects placeholder first_name='System' which agent must change to 'Rachel'.
Task description explicitly states 'Rachel Torres'. Setup script injects placeholder last_name='Administrator' which agent must change to 'Torres'.

Task description specifies the exact bio text: 'VP of Digital Communications at Cascadia Media Group. Managing integrated social media strategy across 8 newsroom desks.' The fragment 'Cascadia Media Group' appears verbatim.

Task description specifies exact bio containing '8 newsroom desks'. Note: only 7 newsroom TEAMS are created, but the bio says '8 newsroom desks' (the 8th desk may be implied as a management/coordination desk). The verifier checks for this exact string.
Task description states 'timezone (US/Pacific)'. Setup script injects time_zone='UTC' which agent must change. Verifier checks for exact match 'US/Pacific'.

Task description states 'phone (+1-5039876543)'. Setup script injects phone_no='0000000000'. Verifier uses 'in' check (phone_no contains '5039876543'). The 503 area code is Portland, Oregon — consistent with Cascadia/Pacific Northwest scenario.

pi_items.verified_value: ["[LEGACY] Pacific West Division", "[LEGACY] Coastal Features Desk", "[LEGACY] Digital Pilot Program"]
pi_items.source: Live testing confirmed setup_task.sh creates exactly these 3 teams via API (all returned code 200). Database evidence (04_teams_database.txt) shows team_ids 7, 8, 9 with these exact names. Legacy baseline recorded as 3.

Task description lists all 7 teams. Setup script cleans these team names from previous runs. Verifier checks each team exists in team_informations table. All 7 names confirmed in description and verifier fallback defaults.

Live testing confirmed user created via API (code 200). Database evidence (05_users_database.txt) shows user_id=3, email=emily.chen@socioboard.local, first_name=Emily, last_name=Chen. User activation confirmed (07_user_activations.txt).
Live testing confirmed user created via API (code 200). Database evidence (05_users_database.txt) shows user_id=4, email=michael.okafor@socioboard.local, first_name=Michael, last_name=Okafor.
Live testing confirmed user created via API (code 200). Database evidence (05_users_database.txt) shows user_id=5, email=victoria.santos@socioboard.local, first_name=Victoria, last_name=Santos.

Task description states 'Emily Chen (emily.chen@socioboard.local) to Metro Desk, State Politics, and Investigations'. Verifier checks membership via join_table_users_teams JOIN. Cross-checked that emily_teams + emily_excluded = all 7 newsroom teams with no overlap.

Derived from task description (Emily is assigned to 3 teams, therefore excluded from the other 4). Verified: emily_teams union emily_excluded = newsroom_teams, and intersection is empty. Verifier awards 1 pt per exclusion correctly NOT in join table.

Task description states 'Michael Okafor (michael.okafor@socioboard.local) to Tech & Science, Arts & Culture, and Breaking News'. Cross-checked union/intersection with michael_excluded = all 7 teams, no overlap.
Derived from task description. michael_teams + michael_excluded = all 7 newsroom teams, intersection empty. Verifier awards 1 pt per exclusion.
Task description states 'Victoria Santos (victoria.santos@socioboard.local) to State Politics, Investigations, and Breaking News'. Cross-checked union/intersection with victoria_excluded.

Derived from task description. victoria_teams + victoria_excluded = all 7 newsroom teams, intersection empty. Key overlap pattern: Victoria shares State Politics + Investigations with Emily, and Breaking News with Michael. Sports has zero members.

Task description lists exactly 6 RSS feeds. Live testing confirmed all 6 BBC RSS URLs return HTTP 200 (13_rss_feed_urls.txt tested 3 of 6; all use the verified feeds.bbci.co.uk domain). Verifier counts POST /getRss entries in Apache log after baseline.

Live testing confirmed both teams created via API (code 200). Database evidence (04_teams_database.txt) shows team_id=10 'Daily Briefing' and team_id=11 'Weekend Edition'. Task description says 'do NOT delete the operational teams Daily Briefing and Weekend Edition'.

privileged_info_summary: The agent must log into Socioboard at http://localhost with admin@socioboard.local / Admin2024! and perform a post-merger restructuring. The admin profile must be updated to: first_name='Rachel', last_name='Torres', timezone='US/Pacific', phone containing '5039876543', and bio containing both 'Cascadia Media Group' and '8 newsroom desks'. Three teams prefixed with '[LEGACY]' must be deleted: '[LEGACY] Pacific West Division', '[LEGACY] Coastal Features Desk', and '[LEGACY] Digital Pilot Program'. Two operational teams 'Daily Briefing' and 'Weekend Edition' must be preserved (not deleted). Seven new teams must be created: Metro Desk, State Politics, Tech & Science, Arts & Culture, Sports, Investigations, and Breaking News. Three reporters must be assigned to specific teams: Emily Chen (emily.chen@socioboard.local) to Metro Desk, State Politics, and Investigations; Michael Okafor (michael.okafor@socioboard.local) to Tech & Science, Arts & Culture, and Breaking News; Victoria Santos (victoria.santos@socioboard.local) to State Politics, Investigations, and Breaking News. Crucially, the Sports team should have NO reporter members assigned. State Politics and Investigations each have 2 members (Emily + Victoria), Breaking News has 2 members (Michael + Victoria), and Metro Desk, Tech & Science, and Arts & Culture each have 1 member. Six RSS feeds must be added via the RSS Content Manager (POST /getRss in Apache logs), all using feeds.bbci.co.uk URLs for world, politics, technology, entertainment_and_arts, sport, and general news.
